markdown:
I live in London, work at [Ocado Technology](https://www.ocadogroup.com/about-us/ocado-technology), and try to focus on these things:

(in order of time spent)
- working full time as product manager for [Ocado Technology](https://www.ocadogroup.com/about-us/ocado-technology): leading online retail into the future by [building better bots](https://internetretailing.net/delivery/delivery/new-robots-and-logistics-tech-sees-ocado-move-to-totally-shake-up-the-online-grocery-delivery-business-24311)
- making a lovely home in SE London with my partner
- still dabbling with lockdown induced vegetable gardening, looking forward to see my asparagus grow to harvest (which will take another two years...)
- working out as many days a week as I can squeeze in, mainly HIIT and power lifting, and finally back to regular and mainly pain free [CrossFit](http://www.theyardpeckham.com/)
- also doing:
- (missing my pre pandemic) fitness boxing at [1Rebel](http://www.1rebel.co.uk/)
- (failing to find time for) bare bow archery at [ArcheryFit](http://archeryfit.com/)
- (no longer, really...) bouldering at [the biscuit factory in Bermondsey](http://www.archclimbingwall.com/)
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

also see [LinkedIn](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/hultberg), @[manne](https://twitter.com/manne), (or my stale @[mannepanne](https://www.instagram.com/mannepanne/))

For a more detailed view of what I have been up to recently, see my profile at Gyroscope

(list last updated: Februrary 2022 | credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
